meta.title: FirstAICode — AI Consulting
meta.description: I bring AI into your business in minimal time — from CRM to website — with one month of backend and content support.

hero.badge: From network engineer to AI consultant
hero.headline: AI — the answer to your business needs
hero.title: Simple,
hero.subtitle: I make AI simple for your business. I bring it into your operation in minimal time — from CRM to website — and stay with you for one month.

problem.title: AI complexity shouldn't block your growth
problem.subtitle: Here's what AI complexity really means: not knowing where to start, which tool to pick, or how much it costs. My job is to make that complexity simple for you.

items.title: You don't know where to start
items.desc: How does AI fit your business? Which tool? Which part? The confusion itself is the biggest barrier.

items.title: You fear it's hard or costly
items.desc: Worried AI is too complex or the cost will spiral — or that you'll be left alone halfway through.

items.title: Competitors are pulling ahead
items.desc: They adopt AI, sell faster, and you fall behind. Customers go where they get a faster answer.

services.title: Our consultation session
services.subtitle: Our path with you, step by step — from needs assessment to execution and support, so AI actually works for you.

items.title: Needs assessment
items.desc: Precise diagnosis before any action. First we find where AI makes you faster.

items.title: AI personal assistant
items.desc: A dedicated assistant that messages customers, quotes prices and follows up — instead of you.

items.title: Launch in minimal time
items.desc: CRM, website and product — set up in minimal time. Not just talk, real execution.

items.title: Backend & content support
items.desc: I stay with you for one month — backend support, content, prompting and fixes are on me.

plan.title: The 3-step First AI Code path
plan.subtitle: A simple, clear path — from diagnosis to execution and support. You know your business; the rest is on me.

steps.title: Precise assessment
steps.desc: Diagnosis before action — we find where AI truly helps, and where it doesn't.

steps.title: Launch in minimal time
steps.desc: CRM, website and an AI assistant — a full system goes live in minimal time.

steps.title: 1-month support
steps.desc: Prompting and updates — I stay with you for one month and won't leave you alone.

featured.title: Private 30-minute consultation
featured.desc: One focused, direct session. I tell you exactly where AI helps your business sell faster and work easier — no jargon.
points: Live review of your business and what can be automated
A practical roadmap to start with AI
Session on Google Meet — link generated automatically after payment

transform.title: Life after AI
transform.subtitle: This is what changes — when AI is brought into your business the right way.

rows.before: Glued to the phone answering every customer
rows.after: AI answers customers, without your involvement

rows.before: Little time, lots of work, flat revenue
rows.after: More sales in the same working hours

rows.before: You don't know where to start
rows.after: You see results from day one

why.title: Why First AI Code?
why.subtitle: A computer-networks specialist who saw AI could become the growth backbone of any business — and built that bridge.

items.title: Trust first
items.desc: Your data stays private. I won't promise what I can't deliver. If AI isn't a fit, I'll say so honestly.

items.title: Simple and clear
items.desc: I make complex tech simple. No unnecessary jargon; costs are clear from the start.

items.title: Practical innovation
items.desc: My focus is real business results, not new toys. Solutions that earn revenue or cut costs.

items.title: Client success
items.desc: Your success = my success. We see results together and I stay with you for one month.

usp.title: The only AI consultant who shows results on day one
usp.subtitle: AI consultant + 1-month support — not just training, real execution.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: First AI Code — AI Consultant
about.body: I came from the world of computer networks and now I help businesses of all sizes — from restaurants to agencies and enterprises — sell faster and work easier with AI. From CRM to a personal assistant and website, we launch it all in minimal time and stay with you for one month.
about.placeholder: Photo and full résumé coming here soon.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before we start.

items.q: Do I need to know how to code to use AI?
items.a: Not at all. The technical part is on me. You know your business; I bring AI into it — without you writing a single line of code.
A 30-minute online session on Google Meet. After payment, your meeting link is generated automatically and emailed to you.
$99 for one focused 30-minute session. You walk away with a practical roadmap to start with AI.

items.q: Am I left alone after the consultation?
items.a: No. If we move forward together, I stay with you for one month — prompting, fixes and real backend and content support. I won't leave you alone.

items.q: My business is small — is this for me?
items.a: Exactly. From restaurants to agencies, from startups to enterprises — AI can transform any business, regardless of size.

ctaBand.title: Ready to bring AI into your work?
ctaBand.subtitle: One 30-minute session, one clear roadmap.
